items.title: Omnichannel operations discovery
items.name: Omnichannel operations discovery
items.summary: Planned discovery to identify which finance and reporting gaps most limit omnichannel product depth.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which omnichannel reporting and settlement workflows deserve Q3 investment.

items.title: Platform monetization discovery
items.name: Platform monetization discovery
items.summary: Planned discovery to identify which funds-flow controls most improve platform monetization depth without increasing operator burden.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which platform monetization controls become product defaults in Q3.
